top_signals.title: Private equity bosses warn of AI threat to bets on law and accountancy
top_signals.summary: Buyout groups that have invested heavily in professional services face disruption from developing technology
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The new oil? Inside the effort to turn AI computing power into a tradeable commodity
top_signals.summary: AI compute futures could eventually rival some of the world's largest commodity markets, Silicon Data's Carmen Li believes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid, Uniswap and Worldcoin buck crypto slump as traders chase AI, DeFi trends
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Nikkei 225 breaks 70,000 on hopes for peace and after rate increase
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran have reached a preliminary agreement that includes reopening the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ex-Citi executive says bank sacked her after raising Trump concerns
top_signals.summary: Former employee claims in lawsuit that she identified issues with risk-management practices
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Number of bookstores in Japan drops below 10,000 for the first time
top_signals.summary: Japan had 9,993 bookstores as of the end of March 2026 — just over 40% of its peak in fiscal year 1998.
